title: helictotrichon planiculme subsp. angustius
intro: Helictotrichon planiculme subsp. angustius, also known as Narrow-leaved Rooster Tail, is a type of ornamental grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Helictotrichon planiculme subsp. angustius include its ability to support the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
